lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਰਾਧੀ ਮਤਿਹੀਨੁ ਨਿਰਗੁਨੁ ਅਨਾਥੁ ਨੀਚੁ ॥
lines.translit: aparaadhee matiheen niragun anaath neech |
lines.english: I am a sinner, devoid of wisdom, worthless, destitute and vile.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਲ ਭਰਮ ਕਰਮ ਅਹੰ ਮਮਤਾ ਮਰਣੁ ਚੀਤਿ ਨ ਆਵਏ ॥
lines.translit: mal bharam karam ahan mamataa maran cheet na aave |
lines.english: I am stuck in the filth of doubt and egotistical actions, and I try not to think of death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਠ ਕਠੋਰੁ ਕੁਲਹੀਨੁ ਬਿਆਪਤ ਮੋਹ ਕੀਚੁ ॥
lines.translit: satth katthor kulaheen biaapat moh keech |
lines.english: I am deceitful, hard-hearted, lowly and entangled in the mud of emotional attachment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਨਿਤਾ ਬਿਨੋਦ ਅਨੰਦ ਮਾਇਆ ਅਗਿਆਨਤਾ ਲਪਟਾਵਏ ॥
lines.translit: banitaa binod anand maaeaa agiaanataa lapattaave |
lines.english: In ignorance, I cling to the pleasures of woman and the joys of Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਆਸ ਤੇਰੀ ਸਰਣਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਰਾਖੁ ਨੀਚੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak aas teree saran saadhoo raakh neech |2|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, my hope is in You, Lord; please preserve me, the lowly one, in the Sanctuary of the Holy. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਸੈ ਜੋਬਨੁ ਬਧੈ ਜਰੂਆ ਦਿਨ ਨਿਹਾਰੇ ਸੰਗਿ ਮੀਚੁ ॥
lines.translit: khisai joban badhai jarooaa din nihaare sang meech |
lines.english: My youth is wasting away, old age is approaching, and Death, my companion, is counting my days.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਪਟਿ ਰਹਿਓ ਤਿਹ ਸੰਗਿ ਮੀਠੇ ਭੋਗ ਸੋਨ ॥
lines.translit: lapatt rahio tih sang meetthe bhog son |
lines.english: I am entangled in sweet pleasures and gold.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਰਮੇ ਜਨਮ ਅਨੇਕ ਸੰਕਟ ਮਹਾ ਜੋਨ ॥
lines.translit: bharame janam anek sankatt mahaa jon |
lines.english: I have wandered through countless incarnations, suffering terrible pain in these lives.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭ੍ਰਮਤ ਭਾਰ ਅਗਨਤ ਆਇਓ ਬਹੁ ਪ੍ਰਦੇਸਹ ਧਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: bhramat bhaar aganat aaeo bahu pradesah dhaaeo |
lines.english: After wandering around with such great loads of sin, I have come, after wandering through so many foreign lands.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਖਨਹਾਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਮੁਝ ਤੇ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਹੋਆ ਹੋਨ ॥
lines.translit: raakhanahaare prabh piaare mujh te kachhoo na hoaa hon |
lines.english: God, my Beloved, is my protector; nothing was done, or will ever be done, by myself alone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਬ ਓਟ ਧਾਰੀ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮੁਰਾਰੀ ਸਰਬ ਸੁਖ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: ab ott dhaaree prabh muraaree sarab sukh har naaeo |
lines.english: Now, I have taken the protection of God, and I have found total peace in the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਧਾਰੀਕ ਉਧਾਰੇ ਭਗਤਹ ਸੰਸਾ ਕਉਨ ॥
lines.translit: naam dhaareek udhaare bhagatah sansaa kaun |
lines.english: You saved those who only pretended to believe, so what doubts should Your true devotees have?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਖ ਸਹਜ ਆਨੰਦ ਨਾਨਕ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਤੇਰੀ ਤਰੈ ਭਉਨ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sookh sehaj aanand naanak kripaa teree tarai bhaun |3|
lines.english: I have found peace, poise and bliss, O Nanak; by Your mercy, I swim across the world-ocean. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਨਿ ਸ੍ਰਵਨ ਬਾਨੀ ਪੁਰਖ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਮਨਿ ਨਿਧਾਨਾ ਪਾਵਹੇ ॥
lines.translit: sun sravan baanee purakh giaanee man nidhaanaa paavahe |
lines.english: Listen with your ears to the Word of the Lord's Bani, the hymns of spiritual wisdom; thus you shall obtain the treasure in your mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਨ ਕੇਨ ਪਰਕਾਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਸੁਨਹੁ ਸ੍ਰਵਨ ॥
lines.translit: jen ken parakaare har har jas sunahu sravan |
lines.english: By every means possible, listen to the Praises of the Lord with your ears.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਬਿਧਾਤੇ ਰਾਮ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਹੇ ॥
lines.translit: har rang raate prabh bidhaate raam ke gun gaavahe |
lines.english: Attuned to the Love of the Lord God, the Architect of Destiny, sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਸੁਧ ਕਾਗਦ ਬਨਰਾਜ ਕਲਮਾ ਲਿਖਣ ਕਉ ਜੇ ਹੋਇ ਪਵਨ ॥
lines.translit: basudh kaagad banaraaj kalamaa likhan kau je hoe pavan |
lines.english: The earth is the paper, the forest is the pen and the wind is the writer,

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੇਅੰਤ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਜਾਇ ਪਾਇਆ ਗਹੀ ਨਾਨਕ ਚਰਣ ਸਰਨ ॥੪॥੫॥੮॥
lines.translit: beant ant na jaae paaeaa gahee naanak charan saran |4|5|8|
lines.english: but still, the end of the endless Lord cannot be found. O Nanak, I have taken to the Sanctuary of His lotus feet. ||4||5||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਭਉ ਭਏ ਪਰਾਨ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਸਗਲ ਲਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: nirbhau bhe paraan chintaa sagal lahee |
lines.english: My life has become fearless, and all my anxieties have been removed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁਰਖ ਪਤੇ ਭਗਵਾਨ ਤਾ ਕੀ ਸਰਣਿ ਗਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: purakh pate bhagavaan taa kee saran gahee |
lines.english: The Primal Lord is the Lord God of all beings. I have taken to His Sanctuary.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਤ ਪਿਤਾ ਸੁਤ ਮੀਤ ਸੁਰਿਜਨ ਇਸਟ ਬੰਧਪ ਜਾਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: maat pitaa sut meet surijan isatt bandhap jaaniaa |
lines.english: I know the Lord as my mother, father, son, friend, well-wisher and close relative.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਹਿ ਕੰਠਿ ਲਾਇਆ ਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ ਜਸੁ ਬਿਮਲ ਸੰਤ ਵਖਾਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: geh kantth laaeaa gur milaaeaa jas bimal sant vakhaaniaa |
lines.english: The Guru has led me to embrace Him; the Saints chant His Pure Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਏਕ ਅਨਿਕ ਅਲਖ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਓਟ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਸੁ ਗਹੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: prabh ek anik alakh tthaakur ott naanak tis gahee |1|
lines.english: God is the One and only, the Unseen Lord and Master; O Nanak, I have grasped His protection. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੇਅੰਤ ਗੁਣ ਅਨੇਕ ਮਹਿਮਾ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਜਾਇ ਕਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: beant gun anek mahimaa keemat kachhoo na jaae kahee |
lines.english: His Glorious Virtues are infinite, and His greatness is unlimited. His value cannot be described at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਉਰ ਹਾਰੁ ਬਿਖੁ ਕੇ ਦਿਵਸ ਗਏ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam ur haar bikh ke divas ge |
lines.english: One who wears the necklace of the Lord's Name - his days of suffering are ended.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਬਨੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ਸਹਾਈ ਆਪਿ ਭਏ ॥
lines.translit: amrit ban sansaar sahaaee aap bhe |
lines.english: The world is a pool of nectar, when the Lord becomes our helper.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਨਿ ਸਾਗਰ ਭਏ ਸੀਤਲ ਸਾਧ ਅੰਚਲ ਗਹਿ ਰਹੇ ॥
lines.translit: agan saagar bhe seetal saadh anchal geh rahe |
lines.english: The ocean of fire becomes cool, when one grasps the hem of the robe of the Holy Saint.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਤੁ ਭਰਮ ਮੋਹ ਬਿਕਾਰ ਬਿਨਸੇ ਜੋਨਿ ਆਵਣ ਸਭ ਰਹੇ ॥
lines.translit: gat bharam moh bikaar binase jon aavan sabh rahe |
lines.english: His state of doubt, attachment and sin is erased, and the cycle of reincarnation into the womb is totally ended.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਗੁਪਾਲ ਦਇਆਲ ਸੰਮ੍ਰਿਥ ਬੋਲਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਹਰਿ ਜੈ ਜਏ ॥
lines.translit: govind gupaal deaal samrith bol saadhoo har jai je |
lines.english: The Lord of the Universe, the Sustainer of the World, the merciful all-powerful Lord - the Holy Saints proclaim the victory of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ਪੂਰਨ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਪਾਈ ਪਰਮ ਗਤੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naam dhiaae pooran saadhasang paaee param gate |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, meditating on the Naam, in the perfect Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, I have obtained the supreme status. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਦੇਖਉ ਤਹ ਸੰਗਿ ਏਕੋ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jeh dekhau teh sang eko rav rahiaa |
lines.english: Wherever I look, there I find the One Lord permeating and pervading all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟ ਘਟ ਵਾਸੀ ਆਪਿ ਵਿਰਲੈ ਕਿਨੈ ਲਹਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: ghatt ghatt vaasee aap viralai kinai lahiaa |
lines.english: In each and every heart, He Himself dwells, but how rare is that person who realizes this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਅੰਤੇ ਮਧਿ ਸੋਈ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦੀ ਜਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: aad ante madh soee gur prasaadee jaaniaa |
lines.english: In the beginning, in the middle and in the end, He exists. By Guru's Grace, He is known.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲਿ ਥਲਿ ਮਹੀਅਲਿ ਪੂਰਿ ਪੂਰਨ ਕੀਟ ਹਸਤਿ ਸਮਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jal thal maheeal poor pooran keett hasat samaaniaa |
lines.english: The Lord is permeating and pervading the water, the land and the sky; He is contained in the ant and the elephant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਪਸਰਿਆ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਲੀਲਾ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਗੁਣ ਨਿਧਿ ਜਨਿ ਕਹਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: braham pasariaa braham leelaa govind gun nidh jan kahiaa |
lines.english: God created the expanse of the universe, God created the play of the world. His humble servants call Him the Lord of the Universe, the treasure of virtue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਿਨੁ ਰੈਣਿ ਸੁਹਾਵੜੀ ਆਈ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਹਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: din rain suhaavarree aaee simarat naam hare |
lines.english: Day and night, become beauteous by remembering the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ਹਰਿ ਏਕੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: simar suaamee antarajaamee har ek naanak rav rahiaa |3|
lines.english: Meditate in remembrance on the Lord Master, the Searcher of hearts; O Nanak, He is the One, pervading and permeating all. ||3||
